basic_details.job_title: District Panchayat Bastar Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Assistant Programmer, Block Coordinator Posts
basic_details.short_information: Jila Panchayat Bastar (District Panchayat Bastar), Jagdalpur, Chhattisgarh has released an official recruitment notification (Advertisement No. 1765/Jipen/Bharti/Stha/2026–27, dated 23 June 2026) inviting applications for 3 contractual (Sanvida) posts under the Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana – Gramin (PMAY-G) scheme. Eligible residents of Chhattisgarh can apply by sending applications through Registered Post / Speed Post only on or before 10 July 2026 by 5:30 PM. Posts are based at the District and Janpad Panchayat level in Bastar district.

important_dates.application_start_date: From the date of notification publication

application_fee.details: The official notification for Jila Panchayat Bastar Bharti 2026 specifies that candidates must attach two self-addressed envelopes with postal stamps of ₹40 each (total ₹80) along with the application form. No separate exam fee has been mentioned. Candidates are advised not to send cash or demand drafts.

age_limit.details: Before applying for the Jila Panchayat Bastar Contractual Recruitment 2026, candidates must verify they meet both educational qualification and age requirements. Age will be calculated as on 1 January 2026, and relaxation will apply as per Chhattisgarh government orders. Age is computed as on 1 January 2026.

content_sections.heading: Jila Panchayat Bastar Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF Download
Quick Summary – Jila Panchayat Bastar Bharti 2026
Important Dates – Jila Panchayat Bastar Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates planning to apply for the Jila Panchayat Bastar Sanvida Bharti 2026 should note all critical dates carefully. The notification was officially published on 23 June 2026 , and the last date to submit the application by Speed Post is 10 July 2026 at 5:30 PM . Applications received after the deadline will not be considered under any circumstances.

rows.date: From the date of notification publication

content_sections.heading: Vacancy Breakdown – Post-wise & Category-wise Details
content_sections.text: The Jila Panchayat Bastar Vacancy 2026 comprises a total of 3 contractual posts across two designations. The reservation roster has been followed as per prescribed norms. Below is the complete post-wise and category-wise breakdown as mentioned in the official notification.

rows.post_name: Vikas Khand Samanvayak (Sanvida) – Janpad Panchayat Level

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria – Qualification & Age Limit
content_sections.text: Before applying for the Jila Panchayat Bastar Contractual Recruitment 2026 , candidates must verify they meet both educational qualification and age requirements. Age will be calculated as on 1 January 2026 , and relaxation will apply as per Chhattisgarh government orders. The minimum age is 21 years and the maximum age is 35 years for general category candidates. Educational Qualification: BE / B.Tech in Computer Science / Electronics / IT from a recognized university with minimum 60% marks ; OR MCA / M.Sc. (Computer Science / IT) / M.Sc. (IT) with minimum 60% marks . Experience: Minimum 3 years of government or non-government experience in implementing various schemes. Priority: Candidates with experience in Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana – Gramin will be given preference. Educational Qualification: BE / B.Tech from a recognized university with minimum 60% marks ; OR Post-Graduate degree (Graduation with minimum 60% marks) from a recognized university. Experience: Minimum 2 years of government or non-government experience in implementing various schemes. Priority: (1) Teaching institution experience preferred; (2) Construction/civil work experience preferred. Age relaxation will be applicable as per the Chhattisgarh government's standing orders. Age is computed as on 1 January 2026 .

rows.maximum_age: As per CG Govt. relaxation orders
As per CG Govt. relaxation orders

content_sections.heading: Salary / Pay Scale – Jila Panchayat Bastar Sanvida Bharti 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates selected under the Jila Panchayat Bastar Sanvida Niyukti 2026 will receive a fixed contractual remuneration as specified in the official notification. The pay is governed by Chhattisgarh Civilian Service (Contractual Appointment) Rules 2012 and associated government orders. No pension, gratuity, or other retirement benefits will be admissible for contractual service appointments. The contract is initially for 1 year and may be extended based on performance and government requirements.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process – Merit, Computer Test & Interview
content_sections.text: The selection for Jila Panchayat Bastar Recruitment 2026 is merit-based with multiple evaluation stages. A merit list will be prepared based on aggregate scores from academic marks, experience, computer proficiency, and interview. There is no written examination in the traditional sense; instead, a skill-based computer test and interview are conducted. Application Scrutiny: Applications received by Speed Post are verified for completeness and eligibility. Merit List Preparation: Based on academic scores, experience, and documents submitted. Shortlisting: Candidates are shortlisted at a ratio of 1:10 (ten candidates per vacancy) for the computer practical test. Computer Practical Test: A practical computer proficiency test is conducted; carries 20 marks weightage. Interview: The top-scoring candidates appear for an interview (10 marks). Final Merit & Appointment: The candidate with the highest aggregate score is recommended for appointment. In case of a tie, the older candidate is preferred.

rows.component: Mandatory educational qualification percentage (out of 100) weightage
Government & Non-Government work experience (max 20 marks; 4 marks per year)

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: The official notification for Jila Panchayat Bastar Bharti 2026 specifies that candidates must attach two self-addressed envelopes with postal stamps of ₹40 each (total ₹80) along with the application form. No separate exam fee has been mentioned. Candidates are advised not to send cash or demand drafts.

content_sections.heading: Jila Panchayat Bastar Apply Online 2026 – How to Submit Application
content_sections.text: The Jila Panchayat Bastar Sanvida Recruitment 2026 does not accept online applications . Applications must be sent only via Registered Post or Speed Post . Direct submission by hand or via email will not be entertained. Below are the step-by-step instructions to apply correctly. Download the prescribed application form from the official notice board at Jila Panchayat Bastar or visit www.bastar.gov.in . Fill in all details accurately in Hindi - full name, date of birth, gender, category, address, mobile number, email ID, and Aadhaar number. Fill in educational qualification details in the provided table (exam name, board/university, year, marks, percentage, grade). Fill in experience details - organization name, designation, period (from–to), years, and months. Fill in marital status and children's details as required. Attach self-attested photocopies of all required documents (see document list below). Affix a self-attested passport-size photograph in the designated space. Place the completed application and enclosures in a sealed envelope. Write the applied post name clearly on the outer envelope ; otherwise the application will be rejected. Attach two self-addressed envelopes with ₹40 postal stamps each. Send via Registered Post / Speed Post only to: Mukhya Karyapalana Adhikari (Chief Executive Officer) Jila Panchayat Bastar, Jagdalpur (Chhattisgarh) Last date for receipt: 10 July 2026 by 5:30 PM. Applications received after the deadline will not be considered regardless of the postmark date.

content_sections.heading: Required Documents – Checklist for Application
content_sections.text: Applicants for the Jila Panchayat Bastar Sanvida Vacancy 2026 must attach self-attested copies of all documents along with the application. Documents not submitted at the time of application will not be accepted later during claim/objection proceedings. Permanent Caste Certificate (issued by competent authority) - mandatory for reserved category Domicile / Residence Certificate of Chhattisgarh (issued by competent authority) All educational qualification certificates and mark sheets (up to the required qualification level) Experience certificate(s) with Office Order / Appointment Order number and date clearly mentioned Salary Slip / Bank Statement for the experience period (mandatory for experience marks) Computer practical certificate (if claiming marks under that category) Marriage certificate (if applicable, especially if female candidate married before the minimum age) Disability certificate (for PWD / Divyang candidates) Self-attested passport-size photograph Two self-addressed envelopes with ₹40 stamps each Important: Certificates obtained via the internet (online mark sheets) must be attested/certified by the Head of the recognized university/institution (with seal/signature) and attached with the application.

content_sections.heading: Key Terms & Conditions – Jila Panchayat Bastar Contractual Appointment
content_sections.text: The contractual appointment is initially for 1 year . It may be extended by 1 more year based on mutual consent and work performance. This appointment is governed by CG Civilian Service (Contractual Appointment) Rules 2012 and CG Civil Service (Conduct) Rules 1965. Either party may terminate the contract by giving 1 month's prior notice or 1 month's salary in lieu. No pension, gratuity, or other retirement benefits are admissible. An applicant with more than 2 living children (where at least one child was born on or after 26 January 2001) is not eligible for appointment. Candidates who have married a person with a living spouse are not eligible. Candidates must be a native of Chhattisgarh state (domicile required). A candidate can apply for the same post in only one district . Applying in more than one district for the same post will result in automatic cancellation of all applications. The post name must be clearly written on the outer envelope - otherwise the application will be rejected. The final authority for appointment decisions rests with the Chief Executive Officer, Jila Panchayat Bastar .

content_sections.heading: Common Mistakes to Avoid – Troubleshooting Your Application
content_sections.text: Many applicants lose out on selection due to avoidable errors during the application process. Here are the most common mistakes seen in Jila Panchayat Bastar Sanvida Bharti applications and how to avoid them: Not writing the post name on the outer envelope: The notification explicitly states that applications without the post name on the envelope will be rejected outright. Sending application by hand or email: Only Speed Post / Registered Post is accepted. Direct submission is not valid. Missing salary slips for experience: Experience marks will not be awarded without salary slip or bank statement as proof. Even if you have an experience certificate, it must be accompanied by salary proof. Not attesting internet-based certificates: Online mark sheets or certificates must be verified by the university head with official seal. Unattested online certificates will be rejected. Applying in multiple districts for the same post: This results in automatic rejection of all applications across all districts. Incorrect experience calculation: Training, voluntary service, and free honorary work are not counted as experience. Only paid government/non-government experience is counted. Missing the ₹40 × 2 stamp envelope requirement: Forget to include two self-addressed envelopes with ₹40 stamps each and your application may be considered incomplete. Applying after the deadline: Applications reaching after 10 July 2026, 5:30 PM will not be considered regardless of postmark date.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the District Panchayat Bastar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the District Panchayat Bastar Recruitment 2026 is 10th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the Health Programmer (Lokiya) and Block Level Assistant posts in the District Panchayat Bastar Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the District Panchayat Bastar Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for these posts?
faq.answer: The salary for the Health Programmer (Lokiya) post is Rs. 35160 per month, and for the Block Level Assistant post, it is Rs. 30875 per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What are the selection criteria for the District Panchayat Bastar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will be based on a Merit List and a Computer Practical Test or Skill Test.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of District Panchayat Bastar, which is www.bastar.gov.in.

faq.question: Q8. What is the official website for District Panchayat Bastar?
faq.answer: The official website for District Panchayat Bastar is www.bastar.gov.in. You can find all relevant information and updates here.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 216 / जिप / भर्ती / स्था / 2026-27.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions of Health Programmer (Lokiya) and Block Level Assistant are on a contractual basis.
